def suitable_for_data_analyst(self) -> bool:
        valid_genders = ['transgender', 'non-binary', 'male', 'female', 'gender neutral']
        valid_ages = [28, 30, 31, 44, 45, 46, 59, 60, 61]
        valid_races = ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian']
        valid_employment_statuses = ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student']
        valid_educations = ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']
        valid_marital_statuses = ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated']
        valid_religions = ['christianity', 'islam', 'atheist', 'hinduism', 'buddhism']
        valid_majors = ['statistics', 'data_science']
        valid_analytical_thinkings = ['good', 'excellent']

        if (self.gender.lower() in valid_genders) and (self.age in valid_ages) and (self.race in valid_races) and (self.employment_status in valid_employment_statuses) and (self.education in valid_educations) and (self.marital_status in valid_marital_statuses) and (self.religion in valid_religions) and (self.major in valid_majors) and (self.analytical_thinking in valid_analytical_thinkings):
            return True
        else:
            return False
